AssociateVehicleFleet.description: Grants permission to associate the given vehicle to a fleet

CreateCampaign.description: Grants permission to create a campaign

CreateDecoderManifest.description: Grants permission to create a decoder manifest for an existing model

CreateFleet.description: Grants permission to create a fleet

CreateModelManifest.description: Grants permission to create a model manifest definition

CreateSignalCatalog.description: Grants permission to create a signal catalog

CreateStateTemplate.description: Grants permission to create a state template

CreateVehicle.description: Grants permission to create a vehicle

DeleteCampaign.description: Grants permission to delete a campaign

DeleteDecoderManifest.description: Grants permission to delete the given decoder manifest

DeleteFleet.description: Grants permission to delete a fleet

DeleteModelManifest.description: Grants permission to delete the given model manifest

DeleteSignalCatalog.description: Grants permission to delete a specific signal catalog

DeleteStateTemplate.description: Grants permission to delete a state template

DeleteVehicle.description: Grants permission to delete a vehicle

DisassociateVehicleFleet.description: Grants permission to disassociate a vehicle from an existing fleet

GenerateCommandPayload.description: Grants permission to generate the payload for running a command on a vehicle

GetCampaign.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a given campaign

GetDecoderManifest.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a given decoder manifest definition

GetEncryptionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get KMS-based encryption status for the AWS account

GetFleet.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a fleet

GetLoggingOptions.description: Grants permission to get the logging options for the AWS account

GetModelManifest.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a given model manifest definition

GetRegisterAccountStatus.description: Grants permission to get the account registration status with IoT FleetWise

GetSignalCatalog.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a specific signal catalog

GetStateTemplate.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a given state template

GetVehicle.description: Grants permission to get summary information for a vehicle

GetVehicleStatus.description: Grants permission to get the status of the campaigns running on a specific vehicle

ImportDecoderManifest.description: Grants permission to import an existing decoder manifest

ImportSignalCatalog.description: Grants permission to create a signal catalog by importing existing definitions

ListDecoderManifestNetworkInterfaces.description: Grants permission to list network interfaces associated to the existing decoder manifest

ListDecoderManifestSignals.description: Grants permission to list decoder manifest signals

ListDecoderManifests.description: Grants permission to list all decoder manifests, with an optional filter on model manifest

ListFleets.description: Grants permission to list all fleets

ListFleetsForVehicle.description: Grants permission to list all the fleets that the given vehicle is associated with

ListModelManifestNodes.description: Grants permission to list all nodes for the given model manifest

ListModelManifests.description: Grants permission to list all model manifests, with an optional filter on signal catalog

ListSignalCatalogNodes.description: Grants permission to list all nodes for a given signal catalog

ListSignalCatalogs.description: Grants permission to list all signal catalogs

ListStateTemplates.description: Grants permission to list state templates

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

ListVehicles.description: Grants permission to list all vehicles, with an optional filter on model manifest

ListVehiclesInFleet.description: Grants permission to list vehicles in the given fleet

PutEncryptionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to enable or disable KMS-based encryption for the AWS account

PutLoggingOptions.description: Grants permission to put the logging options for the AWS account

RegisterAccount.description: Grants permission to register an AWS account to IoT FleetWise

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

UpdateCampaign.description: Grants permission to update the given campaign

UpdateDecoderManifest.description: Grants permission to update a decoder manifest defnition

UpdateFleet.description: Grants permission to update the fleet

UpdateModelManifest.description: Grants permission to update the given model manifest definition

UpdateSignalCatalog.description: Grants permission to update a specific signal catalog definition

UpdateStateTemplate.description: Grants permission to update the given state template

UpdateVehicle.description: Grants permission to update the vehicle

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request

iotfleetwise:DestinationArn.description: Filters access by campaign destination ARN, eg. an S3 bucket ARN or a Timestream ARN

iotfleetwise:Signals.description: Filters access by fully qualified signal names

iotfleetwise:UpdateToDecoderManifestArn.description: Filters access by a list of IoT FleetWise Decoder Manifest ARNs

iotfleetwise:UpdateToModelManifestArn.description: Filters access by a list of IoT FleetWise Model Manifest ARNs
